Petition To Determine Title To Real And Personal Property
Off Calendar Sep-30-2009 Continued To Dec-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Cullen for Gertherine Forbes.

Mr. Cullen stated that they had agreed to mediate as suggested by the Court and that they wanted a return date of December 14, 2009. The Court referred the matter to Pro Bono Mediation (signing the order for the same in open court). Mediation must be completed no later than December 11, 2009. The matter was continued to December 15, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
